channel.title: Modding on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Modding on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Playing Games As Intended
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about playing games as intended.

item.title: The Cost Of Moddability
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the cost of modability, specifically the cost of making your video game modable by end users.

item.title: Modding
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about moding.

item.title: My AD&D Mods
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about modding the original advanced Dungeons and Dragons.
